Recovery grace summary

Short grace summary.

Recovery grace-period note

Recovery grace-period notes matter when operators need to understand how long a workload can remain on softened recovery pacing after a burst-credit incident.

The note should define grace thresholds, dashboard checkpoints, and the signals that show when normal pacing can resume without renewed pressure on shared throughput.

It should also explain how fallback regions, retry controls, and exception queues behave while the grace window is still active.
